case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY vs. SEGOVIA, LYCETT et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SCHOONOVER STEVEN. HEARING SET FOR JUN-14-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF APR-11-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON APR-11-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY STEVEN T SCHOONOVER., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-26-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, LYCETT SEGOVIA, ADELINA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-05-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-06-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-17-2000
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
